quotes: Style: **minimal line illustration** for clarity and quick recall. New icons are permitted but **must match this stylistic approach** (consistent stroke weight, rounded line caps, single-color line work).

rules.rule_text: Iconography must use minimal line illustration for clarity and quick recall, featuring consistent stroke weight, rounded line caps, and single-color line work. Any new icons must match this stylistic approach.

quotes: Icon colors and backgrounds adjustable **only within the brand palette**.

rules.rule_text: Icon colors and background options are adjustable only within the authorized brand palette.
